title: Lost.
description: A horror modpack focused around the backrooms.
body:
# Lost in the backrooms

**DO NOT INSTALL ANYTHING EXTRA TO THIS MODPACK, THERE IS A 90% CHANCE IT WILL CRASH**






This is a true horror experience. The backrooms mod provided in this modpack is the most expansive yet, including several features from highly acclaimed backrooms games on Steam. Surviving will not be easy, will not be fun and will cause a ton of fear.
# 






_Play with at minimum 1 friend, it is more enjoyable_

_Lower-end PCs might not be able to run this modpack_
# 







_Mod made by SpacePotato:_<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XnO1GAlR3qo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
